name: Telegram Notifier
overview: Sends Telegram sendPhoto notifications for newly added movies, episodes and seasons.
description: Monitors your Jellyfin library for new additions and sends rich Telegram messages with cover art, customisable templates, smart season aggregation, deduplication and a manual retrigger panel.

versions.changelog: Fixed season notification trigger on single episode addition by requiring authoritative TVDB data.
Searchable image dropdown for retrigger with thumbnail preview support.
